languageStrings.LBL_CODE_DESCRIPTION: The code is used in placeholders, for example $(dynamic : pdf_generator_footer)$. It cannot be changed after saving.
languageStrings.LBL_EMPTY_IS_GLOBAL: Leave empty to make this element available globally.
languageStrings.LBL_VARIABLE_PANEL_NEED_MODULE: Module and related fields appear after you set the module name and reload this page. General variables and aliases are still available when the module is empty (within this element's scope).
languageStrings.LBL_DYNAMIC_ELEMENT_USED: This dynamic element cannot be deleted because it is used by a PDF template. Disable the element instead.
languageStrings.LBL_TYPE_DOCUMENT_LAYOUT_HINT: Document layout type uses separate header / body / footer fields and fills the whole PDF template layout in step 3 at once. Other types insert a single fragment placeholder in the active editor region.
